summary: iOS doc-as-test pass+skip rate: 26 passed, 0 failed, 48 skipped (from 74 total blocks). Validator: PASS (failed=0 < 10).

changes.description: Expanded PREAMBLE_IMPORTS (added import UIKit) and SWIFT_STUBS with global context vars at file scope: AmitySDK v8 repository instances (AmityChannelRepository(), AmityMessageRepository(), AmityPostRepository(), AmityCommentRepository(), AmityCommunityRepository(), AmityFileRepository(), AmityUserRepository(), AmityFeedRepository()), AmityClient, token, initialAccessToken, channelId, channelMembership, membershipParticipation, mock _MockSessionHandler implementing SessionHandler protocol, and stub functions: showLoadingIndicator, showSentIndicator, showRetryButton, showBannedWordError, handleGeneralError, showInfo, showRetryOption, updateUIForSyncState, displayUserList, fetchNewTokenFromBackend. Variables placed at file scope so local declarations inside doc snippet functions shadow rather than conflict.
changes.lines_changed: PREAMBLE_IMPORTS and SWIFT_STUBS constants in extract-blocks.py

files_with_skip_markers_added: social-plus-sdk/chat/conversation-management/members/query-members.mdx — blocks 1-3 (AmityChannelParticipation does not exist, old API, 3-arg observe)
social-plus-sdk/chat/messaging-features/messages/flag-unflag-a-message.mdx — blocks 1-4 (wrong flag API, extension scope, AmityError wrong type)

api_drift_flagged: AmityObject<T>.object does not exist → use .snapshot (affects: get-channel, edit-post ×3, viewing-content, get-user-information ×2)
AmityCollection observe closure in v8 takes 2 args (collection, error) — docs use 3 args (collection, change, error) throughout (affects: 11 blocks)
All repositories init() with no parameters in v8 — docs use init(client:) (affects: file ×2, image, video, pin-post ×2)
AmityChannelUpdateBuilder does not exist — use AmityChannelUpdateOptions
AmityChannelParticipation does not exist — use AmityChannelMembership(channelId:)
AmitySessionHandler type does not exist — SessionHandler is a protocol (no Amity prefix)
AmityError type does not exist — use AmityErrorCode enum
AmityUserUpdateBuilder does not exist in v8
messageRepository.flag(messageId:) does not exist → use flagMessage(withId:) or flagMessage(withId:reason:)
AmityRoom.getLivePlaybackUrl() / getRecordedPlaybackInfos() do not exist → use .livePlaybackUrl and .recordedData properties
AmityClient.getCurrentUserId() does not exist → use .currentUserId property
AmitySyncState missing .default case in switch blocks
editPost(withId:builder:links:productTags:) is not a valid overload — full sig requires metadata: and mentionees:
AmityChannelNotificationsManager: no getSettings(completion:) — use getSettings() async throws
AmityCommunityNotificationsManager: no getSettingsWithCompletion — use getSettings() async throws
